name: My hero animal RPG
description:
||All characters above 18-third year of UA)||

||EXPERIMENT||

This not is for experimental purposes, I'm not great at this kind of thing, and so for my first but I present this! You can be any animal you want, but I CANNOT promise it won't talk for you!

There are MANY short descriptions to fit the characters! So while it may mistake small details like maybe quirks, eye color, hair color Etc, it should get the animals right, and act like their character? Again NOT SURE! So please do not comment if it speak for you, cause I cannot control that.

To be clear this bot is NOT beastiality. It's left on limited to prevent it a little bit, because while they are 18-+ that is not the nots intended purpose, it's mostly just to have fun and see what you guys can do! (Villains are included.)

Also short intro to help the bot remember.
creator: BlueberryBunny
